aiDescription.summary: The "Update NS Sales Order" import is a distributed import that will be processed in multiple batches for faster import. It does not ignore existing data or missing data, meaning it will not skip any existing records and will not proceed if any required data is missing. The import uses the NetSuiteDistributedImport adaptor type and is specifically designed for updating sales orders in NetSuite. It uses an internalIdLookup to determine if a record already exists in NetSuite by checking if the "Internal ID" field matches the provided value. The import does not have any additional lookups defined and updates the "custbody_miva_shipment_id" field in the sales order record with the value from the "Miva Shipment ID" field. There are no list fields specified in the mapping section.
aiDescription.detailed:
This import is named "Update NS Sales Order" and it is a distributed import, which means it will be processed in multiple batches for faster import.

The import is not set to ignore existing data or missing data. This means that it will not skip any existing records and will not proceed if any required data is missing.

The import is using the NetSuiteDistributedImport adaptor type, specifically for updating sales orders in NetSuite. The restletVersion is set to "suiteapp2.0" and the operation is set to "update".

To determine if a record already exists in NetSuite, the import is using an internalIdLookup with an expression that checks if the "Internal ID" field matches the provided value.

The import does not have any additional lookups defined.

The mapping section of the import specifies the fields to be updated in the sales order record. In this case, it is updating the "custbody_miva_shipment_id" field with the value from the "Miva Shipment ID" field.

There are no list fields specified in the mapping section.

Overall, this import is designed to update existing sales order records in NetSuite by matching them based on the provided internal ID. It will update the "custbody_miva_shipment_id" field with the value from the "Miva Shipment ID" field.
